summary: Backend smoke test for Du'Spicci v4 (SSE + extend + rate + online). UserPublic schema and online indicator are working, but the four new v4 endpoints (/api/events, /api/threads/{id}/extend, /api/threads/{id}/rate, /api/users/{id}/ratings) are NOT implemented in /app/backend/server.py — all return HTTP 404. Most v4 acceptance criteria cannot be tested until backend code is added.
passed: POST /api/auth/register returns AuthResponse with UserPublic that includes new fields online=false, avg_rating=null, ratings_count=0
GET /api/auth/me returns UserPublic schema with online/avg_rating/ratings_count fields present
last_seen touch works: after calling /auth/me then GET /api/users/{my_id} returns online=true (<60s rule)
GET /api/threads still works (returns [] for fresh user)

failed.evidence: curl /api/events?token=<valid> -> HTTP 404 application/json. grep of server.py shows no /events route.
curl -X POST /api/threads/fake/extend -> {"detail":"Not Found"} HTTP 404. grep server.py: no extend endpoint, only ThreadOut model fields.
curl -X POST /api/threads/fake/rate stars=5 -> {"detail":"Not Found"} HTTP 404. No rate endpoint in server.py.
curl /api/users/fake/ratings -> {"detail":"Not Found"} HTTP 404. No /ratings endpoint in server.py.

failed.issue: Legacy user test@duspicci.it/test1234 no longer logs in (401 Email o password non corretti). Not blocking — registered a fresh user to proceed.

action_items: Implement SSE endpoint GET /api/events (accepting token via Authorization header AND ?token= query param) returning text/event-stream, wired to _push helper.

Implement POST /api/threads/{id}/extend with logic: only participants; if both confirm -> set extended=true, expires_at += 24h, clear extend_requests; second extend after extended -> 400 'Già estesa una volta'.

Implement POST /api/threads/{id}/rate: 400 if not expired ('Puoi valutare solo dopo la scadenza della chat'), 400 if duplicate ('Hai già lasciato una valutazione'), 403 if non-participant, validate stars 1-5 and comment ≤2500 chars; insert into ratings collection; recompute and persist avg_rating + ratings_count on target user.
Implement GET /api/users/{id}/ratings returning list of RatingOut.
Verify /api/threads ThreadOut already returns extended, extend_pending_mine, extend_pending_other, can_rate, rated (model OK, but cannot be verified end-to-end without extend/rate endpoints).
test_credentials: Legacy test@duspicci.it/test1234 returns 401 — flagged. Used freshly-registered t1tester<ts>@duspicci.it/test1234 for this run.
